field.name: wechatpay_appid
field.required: code == 'wechatpay' and state != 'disabled' and not wechatpay_simulation_mode

field.name: wechatpay_mchid
field.required: code == 'wechatpay' and state != 'disabled' and not wechatpay_simulation_mode

field.name: wechatpay_api_v3_key
field.required: code == 'wechatpay' and state != 'disabled' and not wechatpay_simulation_mode

field.name: wechatpay_merchant_serial_no
field.required: code == 'wechatpay' and state != 'disabled' and not wechatpay_simulation_mode

field.name: wechatpay_platform_serial_no
field.required: code == 'wechatpay' and state != 'disabled' and not wechatpay_simulation_mode

field.name: wechatpay_private_key
field.required: code == 'wechatpay' and state != 'disabled' and not wechatpay_simulation_mode

field.name: wechatpay_platform_certificate
field.required: code == 'wechatpay' and state != 'disabled' and not wechatpay_simulation_mode
